{"society_power": 4.0, "state_power": 1.5, "society_change": -0.5, "state_change": -1.0, "key_event": "Financial collapse, Beirut blast, state paralysis toward Absent Leviathan", "reasoning": "The currency/banking collapse, Beirut Port explosion, prolonged presidential vacancy, and public-service breakdown drove the state near-collapse (drifting toward an Absent Leviathan), while the 2019 thawra and 2022 reformist gains gave society bursts of autonomous energy but impoverishment and emigration atomized it, leaving it modestly weaker overall."}
